description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle featuring a matte black finish with some olive drab accents on the handguard and magazine. The rifle is equipped with a collapsible stock, a detachable box magazine, and a prominent suppressor attached to the end of the barrel. It has a pistol grip and a flat-top receiver with a mounted red dot sight for rapid target acquisition. The handguard appears ribbed for improved grip, and the overall design is modular, typical of contemporary urban combat rifles. The construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials for durability and reduced weight.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, suppressor, red dot sight, and detachable magazine, finished in matte black with olive drab accents.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the suppressor and the narrow profile of the handguard and sight.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, red dot sight, and suppressor.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the stock and the alignment of the sight and barrel, with the suppressor visible at the far end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the same features from the other side.
